text:
Dual Eligibility Code ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates coverage for beneficiaries entitled to Medicare (Part A and/or B benefits) and eligible for 
some category of Medicaid benefits in the month (i.e., dually eligible). There are separate variables for 
each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: DUAL_ELGBL_CD_01 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_02 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_03 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_04 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_05 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_06 
 DUAL_ELGBL_CD_07 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_08 
DUAL_ELGBL_CD_09
